{{Infobox technique
| name = Shadow’s Edge
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Shadow’s Edge]] is a [[Striker technique]] with shadow and [[sword]] aspects.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Shadow’s Edge]] is a technique mastered by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shadow’s Edge]] is a technique favored by [[Harmony]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shadow’s Edge]] is a technique that can slice through physical and spiritual material.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
